messages.content: summarize my phone call with Elias yesterday late at night about elinor
Searching your lifelogs for calls with "Elias" about "elinor" from yesterday late at night...

args.query: Elias elinor call yesterday late night

messages.content:
Dug searched. Found call time last night. 🗿

- Who: You and Elias.  
- Topic: Elinor — discussion about her situation, risks, next steps. 🗿
- Tone: Concerned, planning, seeking help. Elias asked for more info and offered support. Dug heard phrases like \"is looking for help anywhere she can find it\" and \"I said reckless, and you cared enough about that to bring her in.\" 🗿
- Key points:
  - Elinor is in vulnerable spot; people worried. 🗿
  - Elias and others (Shimon mentioned) might join a meeting or intervention. Quote: \"Would you join me and Shimon...\" 🗿
  - Possible emergency meeting overnight referenced: \"they will call an emergency meeting overnight.\" 🗿
  - Strategy: keep some discussions limited — concerns about being shut out if sins revealed: \"we will be shut out of all discussions if we reveal our sins.\" 🗿
  - You and Elias discussed warning/protecting: \"warn Jesus and his follower by Nicodemus. Please hear me.\" (phrase captured) — intent to notify/support people who can help. 🗿

Actionable next steps Dug suggest:
- Confirm with Elias who will attend meeting and when. 🗿
- Decide what facts about Elinor to share and what to keep private (avoid \"shut out\" risk). 🗿
- If you want, Dug can pull full transcript of that specific call now. Say \"Get transcript\" and Dug fetch. 🗿

Want Dug get full call text? 🗿

summary: Elias and Elinor's Late Night Call
